translations:
mach
			dir keine Gedanken! Ich werde den König schon zum Schweigen
			bringen

Infectum-wa.turoyo: b-lebo basimo mobele u=ṭaʕnayḏe; mətfakar-ra b-u=darbo
translations:
(der
			Lastträger) brachte mit frohem Herzen seine Last und dachte
			unterwegs

Imperative.turoyo: əmmo ya u=malk-ayḏi i=aṯt-ayḏux tə=mede layba i=aṯt-ayḏux i=barṯ-ayḏi-yo i=barṯo d-u=malko d-i=flān ḥa-yo d-u=hno-yo layt eba tə=mede omər lo=k-owe mətfakar kiba mede i=aṯt-ayḏi kiba ṭabiʕa lay-yo ṭawto
translations:
‘She (the king’s mother-in-law) said: “My king, your wife
			has nothing (bad). Your wife is my daughter, daughter of the king
			so-and-so, and there is nothing (bad) in her”. He said: “It
			won’t do! Think (better)! There is something in the nature of my
			wife that is not good” 81/93-94;
